allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/projects.json'\); const p=d[0]; console.log\('investmentStrategy:', JSON.stringify\(p.investmentStrategy\)\); console.log\('profileImage:', JSON.stringify\(p.profileImage\)\); console.log\('bidders cleared:', p.jobs.every\(j=>j.bidders.length===0\)\);")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([{ 'tag':u.get\('tag'\),'username':u.get\('username'\),'role':u.get\('role'\)} for u in \(d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('users',d\)\)]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/projects.json'\)\); ps=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('projects',[]\); [print\(p['id'],p['name'],sum\(1 for j in p.get\('jobs',[]\) for b in j.get\('bidders',[]\) if b.get\('status'\)=='Bid received'\)\) for p in ps]")
